     The Numbers Business Report

Transporter 3 (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,715,062Details
International Box Office $81,215,895
Worldwide Box Office $112,930,957
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $22,242,650
Total $22,242,650
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mob courier Frank Martin’s latest assignment pairs him with Valentina, the cynical daughter of a Ukrainian official. While her father ponders what to do with three boatloads of toxic waste, Frank must guard the problematic woman and prevent her from wandering too far from his vehicle, or risk triggering the explosive shackles they both wear.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,063,452 (38.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.63 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,626 opening theaters/2,626 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,828,994

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 26th, 2008 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: March 10th, 2009 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of intense action and violence, some sexual content and drug material
Running Time: 103 minutes
Franchise: Transporter
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Kidnap, Ransom, Romance
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: EuropaCorp, TF1 Film Productions, Grive Productions, Apipoulai Productions, Current Entertainment, Canal Plus
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
